concerns.text: Constitution Principle VI (Psychometric Transparency) mandates reporting Cronbach's α for the collected sample. No task exists to calculate or output these values. T005 only documents the algorithm, not the calculation of internal consistency metrics.

FR-007 requires excluding rows missing `acute_sleepiness` data. T011 describes aborting if columns are missing but conflates this with row-level missingness. There is no explicit task to implement the row-exclusion logic for missing `acute_sleepiness` values while keeping the pipeline alive (unless >20% unusable).
FR-006 mandates logging a 'low-group-balance' alert if >70% of participants are intermediate. No task explicitly implements this check or the generation of the alert/warning in the pipeline.

Spec Assumptions and FR-006 require handling 'Invalid MFQ subscale values' (out-of-range) by removing rows and listing exclusions in the report. No task explicitly covers the validation logic for MFQ range checks or the exclusion reporting.

FR-006 requires logging 'out-of-range MFQ scores'. T011 covers column existence and `acute_sleepiness` missingness, but no task explicitly covers the validation and logging of out-of-range MFQ values.
